metadata.name: python_learning_projects
metadata.actual_purpose: Claude Code skills authoring and distribution repository (plugin marketplace 'kalandengit-skills')
metadata.name_note: INFERRED: repo name is historical; contains no Python code, only skill Markdown, JSON manifests, and bash installers
metadata.fact_labels: Values are observed from the repo unless prefixed with 'INFERRED:'

distribution_channels.reach: any Claude Code session opened on this repo, including web
all Claude Code projects of a user, local and web
~/.claude personal skills, per-repo installs, claude.ai chat zip upload

publishable_bundle.behavior: copies bundle to temp dir, git init, force-push main to a pre-created empty repo

technologies.no_build_no_ci: no CI workflows, Docker, package manifests, or tests exist

modules.name: it-prompt-specialist
modules.purpose: Senior multidisciplinary IT expert lens; secure-by-default, best practices, trade-offs, depth adapted to user level; includes French context section

modules.name: planning-first
modules.purpose: Plan-before-code gate: requirement analysis, architecture proposal, numbered plan, files preview, explicit approval STOP, incremental implementation, re-plan on requirement change

modules.name: project-knowledge-exporter
modules.purpose: Investigate the repo with real tools, then generate 5-file knowledge package (PROJECT_BLUEPRINT.md, PROJECT_CONTEXT.json, PROJECT_REBUILD_PROMPT.md, DECISION_LOG.md, DEVELOPMENT_STATE.md), labeling facts vs inferences, no source dumps

modules.name: export_project
modules.purpose: Byte-identical body to project-knowledge-exporter; separate frontmatter to expose the short command

modules.name: installers
modules.behavior: write .claude/skills/<skill>/SKILL.md into target repo; insert/update managed CLAUDE.md block between '<!-- BEGIN <skill> (managed) -->' markers via awk; optional COMMIT=1 PUSH=1 branch workflow; idempotent
modules.variants: older two embed SKILL.md as heredoc; newer two curl from raw.githubusercontent.com (RAW_URL overridable)

modules.name: publish-claude-skills
modules.behavior: publishes claude-skills/ bundle to a standalone GitHub repo (force-push main from temp clone)

entities.name: Skill
entities.definition: SKILL.md with YAML frontmatter (name, description, optional when_to_use, version, author) + Markdown behavior body
entities.naming: lowercase; hyphens conventional; underscores verified working (export_project)

entities.name: Plugin
entities.definition: directory with .claude-plugin/plugin.json wrapping >=1 skill under skills/<skill>/
entities.naming: always hyphenated, even when wrapped skill uses underscore

entities.name: Marketplace
entities.definition: marketplace.json with name, owner, plugins[] (source = relative path)

entities.name: Alias skill
entities.definition: skill byte-identical in body to another, differing only in frontmatter, to expose an extra command name

workflows.name: add a new skill
steps: verify Claude Code discovers it (session skill list) before propagating
copy to skills/<skill>/ and write README.md (install + usage)
register plugin in BOTH marketplace.json files
add CLAUDE.md section (+ managed markers) and update claude-skills/README.md (table, install commands, layout)
validate all JSON with json.load; bash -n the installer; diff the 3 SKILL.md copies
commit on claude/* branch, push, open PR to main

workflows.name: install into one repo (end user)
steps: run scripts/install-<plugin>.sh in target repo (optionally COMMIT=1 PUSH=1)
script writes SKILL.md + managed CLAUDE.md block, optionally commits on branch add-<plugin>-skill

business_rules: IF a new skill is added THEN it must appear in .claude/skills/, skills/ (+README), claude-skills/plugins/ (+plugin.json), both marketplace.json files, an installer script, CLAUDE.md, and claude-skills/README.md
IF the three SKILL.md copies of a skill differ THEN it is a bug; .claude/skills/ copy is canonical
IF JSON changed THEN validate parse before commit
IF a skill name deviates from hyphen convention THEN verify auto-discovery empirically before propagating
IF changing main THEN go through a PR from a feature branch

dependencies.name: raw.githubusercontent.com
dependencies.why: newer installers fetch SKILL.md from main at runtime

coding_conventions: SKILL.md: YAML frontmatter then '---'-separated Markdown sections; imperative behavioral instructions
installers: set -euo pipefail; env-flag config (BRANCH/COMMIT/PUSH/RAW_URL); managed-block markers '<!-- BEGIN <skill> (managed) -->'; idempotent re-runs
skills/<skill>/README.md: what-it-does, install variants (personal/project/marketplace), usage, MIT license footer
branches: claude/<topic>; PR-based merges to main

deployment.release: merge to main (raw URLs and marketplace references point at main)
deployment.optional: publish claude-skills/ bundle to standalone repo via scripts/publish-claude-skills.sh

short_term: publish claude-skills standalone repo (script ready, repo not yet observed to exist)
mid_term: INFERRED: add CI check that the 3 copies of each SKILL.md stay identical and JSON stays valid
INFERRED: converge installers on the fetch-from-raw pattern
long_term: INFERRED: more skills following the established 6-location pattern

known_limitations: no CI: JSON validity and copy-sync are enforced only by discipline
newer installers require network access to raw.githubusercontent.com
claude.ai chat variant of the skills cannot explore a repo; it analyzes attached/connected files only
publish-claude-skills.sh force-pushes main of the target repo
technical_debt: root LICENSE is GPLv3 while claude-skills/LICENSE, all plugin.json files, and skill READMEs say MIT — contradictory licensing
plugin.json repository fields and claude-skills/README.md reference https://github.com/kalandengit/claude-skills which is not yet published
root README.md is a one-line placeholder
Python-oriented .gitignore in a repo with no Python
3-way SKILL.md duplication with no sync automation
two installer generations (embedded heredoc vs raw-URL fetch)

engineering_decisions.why: each channel reaches a different Claude surface; web sessions cannot use ~/.claude

engineering_decisions.decision: repo root is itself a marketplace pointing into ./claude-skills/plugins
engineering_decisions.why: installable immediately without publishing a second repo

engineering_decisions.decision: alias skill (export_project) instead of renaming project-knowledge-exporter
engineering_decisions.why: keep the descriptive name and its auto-activation description while adding a short memorable command; underscore verified working in-session

engineering_decisions.decision: managed CLAUDE.md blocks with BEGIN/END markers
engineering_decisions.why: installers can update their section idempotently without touching user content

engineering_decisions.decision: newer installers fetch SKILL.md from raw URL
engineering_decisions.why: single source of truth, avoids embedded-copy drift (trade-off: needs network)
